queries: E2E pipeline implementing logging and monitoring 2023 authoritative sources
action.query: E2E pipeline implementing logging and monitoring 2023 authoritative sources

Auto-Remediation Pipelines for autoscaling groups validated via e2e chaos tests - UMA Technology
Observability Implementation Strategy for Digital Service Providers (DSPs)

content.text:
Implementing effective logging and monitoring within an end-to-end (E2E) pipeline is crucial for ensuring system reliability, performance, and security. Here are several authoritative and recent sources that provide valuable insights into this topic:

1. **"Monitoring E2E Test Automation: What, Why, and How" by Duda**  
   This article discusses the importance of monitoring E2E test automation, detailing the challenges and strategies involved in maintaining robust monitoring systems. ([medium.com](https://medium.com/duda/monitoring-e2e-test-automation-what-why-and-how-d93cbcd4f23?utm_source=openai))

2. **"Auto-Remediation Pipelines for Autoscaling Groups Validated via E2E Chaos Tests" by UMA Technology**  
   This comprehensive piece explores the design, implementation, and validation of auto-remediation pipelines for autoscaling groups, emphasizing the role of E2E chaos testing in ensuring system robustness. ([umatechnology.org](https://umatechnology.org/auto-remediation-pipelines-for-autoscaling-groups-validated-via-e2e-chaos-tests/?utm_source=openai))

3. **"Observability Implementation Strategy for Digital Service Providers (DSPs)" by Srinivasan Murugesan**  
   This article outlines strategies for implementing observability in cloud-native applications, focusing on the integration of logs, metrics, events, and traces to enhance system visibility. ([itchronicles.com](https://itchronicles.com/big-data/observability-implementation-strategy-for-digital-service-providers/?utm_source=openai))

4. **"A Framework for E2E Audit Trails in System Architectures of Different Enterprise Classes" by Luca Patzelt et al.**  
   This paper presents a framework for comprehensive auditing of IT systems, discussing the importance of E2E audit trails in enhancing system security and reliability. ([scitepress.org](https://www.scitepress.org/Papers/2024/123670/123670.pdf?utm_source=openai))

5. **"Test Automation for Serverless Architectures (FaaS)" in the European Journal of Information Technologies and Computer Science**  
   This article addresses the challenges and considerations for test automation in serverless architectures, highlighting the need for robust observability and monitoring practices. ([ej-compute.org](https://ej-compute.org/index.php/compute/article/view/156?utm_source=openai))

6. **"End-to-End Testing in Banking: A Deep Dive into Best Practices" by Harshavardini Murali**  
   This piece explores best practices for implementing E2E testing in banking systems, emphasizing the critical role of monitoring and logging in ensuring transaction integrity and security. ([aspiresys.com](https://www.aspiresys.com/blog/banking-financial-services/end-to-end-testing-for-banks/best-practices-for-implementing-end-to-end-testing-in-banking-systems/?utm_source=openai))

7. **"CI/CD Pipelines with Automated End-to-End Testing: A Case Study" by Kaisa Otterklau**  
   This case study examines the implementation of CI/CD pipelines with automated E2E testing, discussing the integration of monitoring and logging to enhance system reliability. ([theseus.fi](https://www.theseus.fi/bitstream/handle/10024/893544/Otterklau_Kaisa.pdf?isAllowed=y&sequence=2&utm_source=openai))

8. **"Eadro: An End-to-End Troubleshooting Framework for Microservices on Multi-source Data" by Cheryl Lee et al.**  
   This research introduces Eadro, a framework that integrates anomaly detection and root cause localization based on multi-source data, highlighting the importance of comprehensive monitoring in microservices architectures. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2302.05092?utm_source=openai))

These sources provide a solid foundation for understanding the implementation of logging and monitoring within E2E pipelines, offering both theoretical frameworks and practical insights.

Implementing effective logging and monitoring within an end-to-end (E2E) pipeline is crucial for ensuring system reliability, performance, and security. Here are several authoritative and recent sources that provide valuable insights into this topic:

1. **"Monitoring E2E Test Automation: What, Why, and How" by Duda**  
   This article discusses the importance of monitoring E2E test automation, detailing the challenges and strategies involved in maintaining robust monitoring systems. ([medium.com](https://medium.com/duda/monitoring-e2e-test-automation-what-why-and-how-d93cbcd4f23?utm_source=openai))

2. **"Auto-Remediation Pipelines for Autoscaling Groups Validated via E2E Chaos Tests" by UMA Technology**  
   This comprehensive piece explores the design, implementation, and validation of auto-remediation pipelines for autoscaling groups, emphasizing the role of E2E chaos testing in ensuring system robustness. ([umatechnology.org](https://umatechnology.org/auto-remediation-pipelines-for-autoscaling-groups-validated-via-e2e-chaos-tests/?utm_source=openai))

3. **"Observability Implementation Strategy for Digital Service Providers (DSPs)" by Srinivasan Murugesan**  
   This article outlines strategies for implementing observability in cloud-native applications, focusing on the integration of logs, metrics, events, and traces to enhance system visibility. ([itchronicles.com](https://itchronicles.com/big-data/observability-implementation-strategy-for-digital-service-providers/?utm_source=openai))

4. **"A Framework for E2E Audit Trails in System Architectures of Different Enterprise Classes" by Luca Patzelt et al.**  
   This paper presents a framework for comprehensive auditing of IT systems, discussing the importance of E2E audit trails in enhancing system security and reliability. ([scitepress.org](https://www.scitepress.org/Papers/2024/123670/123670.pdf?utm_source=openai))

5. **"Test Automation for Serverless Architectures (FaaS)" in the European Journal of Information Technologies and Computer Science**  
   This article addresses the challenges and considerations for test automation in serverless architectures, highlighting the need for robust observability and monitoring practices. ([ej-compute.org](https://ej-compute.org/index.php/compute/article/view/156?utm_source=openai))

6. **"End-to-End Testing in Banking: A Deep Dive into Best Practices" by Harshavardini Murali**  
   This piece explores best practices for implementing E2E testing in banking systems, emphasizing the critical role of monitoring and logging in ensuring transaction integrity and security. ([aspiresys.com](https://www.aspiresys.com/blog/banking-financial-services/end-to-end-testing-for-banks/best-practices-for-implementing-end-to-end-testing-in-banking-systems/?utm_source=openai))

7. **"CI/CD Pipelines with Automated End-to-End Testing: A Case Study" by Kaisa Otterklau**  
   This case study examines the implementation of CI/CD pipelines with automated E2E testing, discussing the integration of monitoring and logging to enhance system reliability. ([theseus.fi](https://www.theseus.fi/bitstream/handle/10024/893544/Otterklau_Kaisa.pdf?isAllowed=y&sequence=2&utm_source=openai))

8. **"Eadro: An End-to-End Troubleshooting Framework for Microservices on Multi-source Data" by Cheryl Lee et al.**  
   This research introduces Eadro, a framework that integrates anomaly detection and root cause localization based on multi-source data, highlighting the importance of comprehensive monitoring in microservices architectures. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2302.05092?utm_source=openai))

These sources provide a solid foundation for understanding the implementation of logging and monitoring within E2E pipelines, offering both theoretical frameworks and practical insights.
